data.title: Himax Technologies, Inc. Schedules First Quarter 2026 Financial Results Conference Call on Thursday, May 7, 2026 at 8:00 AM EDT
data.description: Himax Technologies, Inc., a major provider and fabless producer of display drivers and semiconductor products, revealed plans for a conference call to review their Q1 2026 financial results. The call is set for Thursday, May 7, 2026, scheduled at 8:00 a.m. US Eastern Daylight Time and 8:00 p.m. Taiwan Time. Investors and analysts are invited to participate. Himax Technologies, Inc. trades on Nasdaq under the symbol HIMX.
Kiryat Shmona residents hear air raid sirens after rockets detected.

data.title: Tigo Energy Launches New GO Optimized Energy Storage System in European Residential Market
data.description: Tigo Energy, Inc. revealed the launch of the Tigo GO Battery in Europe, part of the Tigo GO optimized product line. This next-generation energy storage system offers up to 47.9kWh of expandable storage capacity. The Tigo GO Battery joins other products in the line such as the GO EV Charger and GO Junction for heat pump integration. This system allows for quicker installation processes thanks to its lightweight design.

data.title: KENT&CURWEN Launch Autumn/Winter 2026 Centenary Collection: WHIPPLESNAITH
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in London, Whipplesnaith introduced a new project inspired by the 1930s secret society, the Night Climbers of Cambridge. The project aims to recreate the thrill and mystery of exploring the world from a unique perspective with friends. Quoting, "We think of those nights spent with one or more friends, nights when we merged with the shadows and could see the world with eyes that were not our own," the initiative seeks to bring people together for adventurous escapades. The project is set to involve various activities and is expected to attract a wide audience.

data.title: Hero Esports Earns Webby Award Nomination for KPL 2025 Grand Finals Opening Ceremony
data.description: In an unprecedented achievement, the Honor of Kings King Pro League (KPL) 2025 Grand Finals Opening Ceremony, an event from China's Hero Esports, has received a nomination for the prestigious title of "Internet's highest honor." This marks the first time a Chinese esports event has been recognized in this manner. The ceremony is being acknowledged for its exceptional utilization of immersive technology within the video game realm. This outstanding recognition comes in the wake of the event held in Shanghai on April 6, 2026.

data.title: Xinhua Silk Road: Mojiang in Yunnan extends global invitation to twin-themed festival for May Day holiday
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Mojiang Hani Autonomous County in Yunnan Province, China, announced its global invitation for travelers to participate in its distinctive twin-themed event during the upcoming May Day holiday. This marks the 20th edition of the Mojiang international celebration.

data.title: Gotion Leads Launch of Europe-Africa Electric Logistics Corridor
data.description: In Morocco on April 6, 2026, Gotion, Green Power Morocco (GPM), and Chery Heavy Trucks inked a deal to establish a eco-friendly freight route linking Morocco and France. This project aims to create a heavy-duty electric logistics corridor that will significantly reduce carbon emissions associated with cross-continental transportation. The agreement signifies a pivotal step towards implementing sustainable transportation practices in the region.

data.title: AIxCrypto Co-CEO Jerry Wang Shares Weekly Investor Update: AI Agent Development and Internal Testing Progress
data.description: On April 6, 2026, AIxCrypto Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIXC) provided a business update through Co-CEO Jerry Wang. The company, specializing in infrastructure for Embodied AI (EAI) and on-chain assets, disclosed important developments for the week.

data.title: Akeso Presents Updated Data on Cadonilimab Combination Therapy in PD-(L)1 Inhibitor-Resistant Advanced NSCLC at ELCC 2026
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Akeso, Inc. disclosed at the 2026 European Lung Cancer Congress that they have released new data with a median follow-up of 21.45 months. This information was shared during the event to shed light on their findings from a prospective, open-label, single-arm, multicenter study. Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) discussed these updated results at the conference.

data.title: Wendy's is Giving Away Free Fries and Frosty on Tuesday, April 7 Thanks to One Iconic Slam Dunk
data.description: Fans have the unique opportunity to enjoy Wendy's famous dunk for no cost on a single day – featuring the beloved combo of Fries and Frosty. This exciting offer is part of a limited-time promotion happening in Dublin, Ohio on April 6, 2026. The renowned dunk took place amid the NCAA® Division I Men's Basketball National Championship Game. Wendy's is providing this special promotion, unlocking an experience that has captured the attention of many.
